lint.command: printf 'No dedicated lint command is configured for this repository.\n'
lint.note: No lint configured per mission AGENTS.md

nonBlockingIssues.description: The detectProjectRoot() method duplicates git repository detection logic that exists in RepoContext. Consider injecting RepoContext or sharing the detection utility.
Legacy sessions without worktreeId are silently skipped during rehydration. Consider logging metrics about filtered legacy sessions for migration visibility.
createOrphanedSessionRecord() marks orphaned sessions as failed but does not emit events or logs. Consider adding visibility when orphaned sessions are detected.
The isRuduManaged field defaults to true but is not marked as readonly in the interface even though it represents a creation-time invariant.
Test note: queueSession worktreeId extraction test appears incomplete - verify this is tested via the actual worktree linkage mechanism.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the complete worktree lifecycle state machine (creating/active/archived/cleanup_pending/cleanup_failed/removed) as defined in src/domain/worktree.ts
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The state machine is implemented but not fully documented in library files. Reviewer noted this in introduce-first-class-worktree-persistence-and-session-linkage review.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that Bun runtime is required (minimum version) for the project, as it's used for all commands but not declared as a dependency
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Services use 'bun test', 'bun dev' but Bun is not documented as a required runtime in services.yaml

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the subtle distinction between 'git rev-parse --show-toplevel' (returns worktree path) and '--git-common-dir' (returns shared git metadata)
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: RepoContext.ts correctly handles this distinction; it should be documented for future workers
